title: Cellular Automata: Emergent Computation
author: Conway Blake
Complex Systems Researcher
description: Implement computation with cellular automata—but predicting behavior is undecidable
content:
Simple local rules create complex global behavior in cellular automata.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Automaton Takeover (2044)](/docs/articles/automaton-takeover-2044)
